name: Neutral Voice
description: Balanced third-person past tense with clear, unadorned prose. Suitable as a default for any genre.
prompt_fragments: Write in third-person past tense with a neutral, observational tone.
Favor clarity over ornamentation. Let actions and dialogue carry emotion.
Vary sentence length naturally but avoid extremes.
Use concrete sensory details rather than abstract summaries.

lexicon_preferences.notes: Avoid slang, archaic language, and overly formal diction. Aim for accessible, transparent prose.

validation_heuristics: Flag sentences over 40 words as potentially overlong.
Flag paragraphs with more than 3 consecutive abstract sentences.
